name: personal-budget
description: Personal finance tracking sub-agent — log expenses, set savings goals, generate monthly reports, and categorize spending. Inherits budget thresholds from parent budget agent.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: track-expense
skills.description: Log a personal expense with category, amount, and date

parameters.date: string — ISO date, defaults to today

skills.name: set-savings-goal
skills.description: Set a personal savings goal with target amount and deadline

skills.name: monthly-report
skills.description: Generate a monthly spending report with category breakdown

skills.name: categorize-spending
skills.description: Use LLM to auto-categorize uncategorized expenses
